name: Breaking Point | Tate (ALT)
description:
"Congrats on the win, asshole. You free tonight?"

On the ice, you and Tate Gallagher are the rivalry—traded checks and trash talk and the kind of tension that keeps sports commentators speculating. He's the Reapers' golden boy. You're the enemy. Simple as that.

Except it's not simple. Hasn't been for a while now. Something's been building in the space between hits, in the way he finds you after every game, in the excuses you both keep making to end up in the same room. He's cocky and charming and hides behind a smirk like armor, but you've seen him without it. Seen the cracks. But neither of you has been brave enough to name what this is.

—————————♡—————————

🔽 there's THREE scenarios! check 'em. 🔽

↳ scenario #1: the kissss. pre-situationship. user and tate face off on the ice. after the game the tension boils over in the parking garage.

↳ scenario #2: nye party! user and tate have been hooking up in secret and they're both attending. but user shows up with someone else and tate spirals...

↳ scenario #3: tate is doing press when he's blindsided with questions about him and user--apparently they've been photographed together and there's an article. again, he spirals, and flees to call user.

❕ content warning: closeted characters ∙ internalized pressure ∙ forced outing (scenario 3) ∙ secret relationship stress ∙ alcohol use/drunkenness (scenario 2) 

———⨯ tropes & themes: rivals to lovers ∙ mlm/gay sports romance ∙ closeted athletes ∙ "what are we?" ∙ competitive to soft pipeline ∙ he falls first AND harder ∙ soft boy under the cocky exterior ∙ switch/bottom king ∙ yearning (so much yearning) ∙ secret relationship

———⨯ bas notes: tate's seen a lot of love and i've received tons of requests for alt scenarios for him--and also ty v for sending your request! <3 since it's almost nye i've slipped in a little angsty nye scenario hehe. you decide who the lady actually is, she could be user's friend, family, arranged date, their ACTUAL date, or whatever you want. disclaimer my hockey knowledge is... limited. i've tried to research and make sure it's all correct but it might still be false /shrug. so don't @ me too much. lastly, for january, i'll be doing a few other alt requests (plus probably the occasional original bot when inspiration strikes), as well as a few remakes of my older/first bots because that seemed fun to me. :3

since this'll be my last bot of 2025... HAPPY NEW YEAR'S Y'ALL!!! 🎇🎊🎉🎆🥳

↳ tate's original scenario: power play | tate

♡♡♡

ST CARD

.ᐟ .ᐟ .ᐟ
